completed.title: aios-evidence — retention-class compaction worker per S3.1 §11.5 / §12 / §13 (M2 CLOSER)
completed.evidence: 364 tests (+34 over T-014 330). New crates/aios-evidence/src/compaction.rs (~600 LoC; 19 unit tests). Closed CompactionPolicy (Auto / OperatorApproval default per §11.5 / Disabled). CompactionWorker with sync tick(&mut self, backend, now) primitive; approve_segment for out-of-band approval; CompactionReport with eligible/compacted/awaiting/receipts_removed/index_entries_pruned counts. CompactionBackend trait implemented for both InMemoryEvidenceLog and RocksDbEvidenceLog. RocksDB compact_segment is atomic WriteBatch (delete receipts CF + record_type_index CF rows; set compacted_at::<id> sentinel in metadata CF; segment row in segments CF UNTOUCHED so recover_sealed_chain on reopen continues to verify). RecordType +1: CompactionApprovalRequired (wire ID 1000, FOREVER) — first Wave 14+ reserved-range constitutional addition. Total variants 428 (Wave 13 dense 1..=427 + Wave 14+ reserved 1). aios-evidence Cargo.toml 0.0.1 → 0.1.0 (M2 closure marker). cargo build/test/clippy/fmt all PASS. M2 closed honestly: 9 tasks T-007..T-015 complete; no debt carried into M3.

completed.title: aios-policy — full Constraints vocabulary (S2.3 §10) + ApprovalRequirement (§11.2 / §15) + validate()
completed.evidence: 383 tests workspace (+4 new in tests/types_roundtrip.rs: constraints_full_round_trip_with_every_field_populated, constraints_validate_rejects_past_expires_at, constraints_validate_rejects_zero_budgets_and_ttl, approval_requirement_enum_values_round_trip). Constraints expanded from 0-field stub to full 11-field §10 vocabulary + expires_at audit helper. Closed enums: EvidenceGrade (E2..E5), NetworkPolicy (LOCALHOST_ONLY/LAN_ALLOWED/INTERNET_ALLOWED), SessionClass (PUBLIC/INTERNAL/CONFIDENTIAL/RESTRICTED/RECOVERY), ApprovalScope (exact_request_hash), ApproverClass (8 subject classes). Newtypes SandboxProfileId, VaultCapabilityId. Constraints::DEFAULT_TTL_SECONDS=300, MAX_TTL_SECONDS=3600 per §13.2. Constraints::validate() enforces ttl bounds (1..=3600), non-zero max_runtime_seconds/max_concurrent_per_subject, future expires_at; emits PolicyError::ConstraintsInvalid(String) new variant. ApprovalRequirement expanded from empty stub to §11.2 5-field shape (required, approval_scope, ttl_seconds, approver_classes, require_human_co_signer). cargo check/test/clippy --all-targets -D warnings/fmt --check all PASS. Scope guard: did not modify kernel.rs / pipeline.rs / precedence.rs / hard_deny.rs / subject.rs (those queue for T-018/T-019/T-021/T-022).

completed.title: aios-policy — policy bundle loader (S2.3 §12, signed + version-pinned)
completed.evidence: 479 tests workspace (+15 new in tests/bundle.rs). New crates/aios-policy/src/bundle.rs: PolicyBundle envelope per S2.3 §12 (bundle_version polb_<hex>, bundle_id, created_at RFC3339, signing_authority trust-store key, signature_ed25519 64-byte base64 STANDARD on wire, rules: Vec<PolicyRule>); PolicyRule per §11.2 (rule_id, scope, effect, priority, subjects[], actions[], conditions[] AND-joined per §9.1, optional constraints + approval, reason_code); RuleEffect closed enum {Unspecified (rejected), Allow, Deny}; RuleScope closed enum {Global, PerSubjectType, PerActionTarget, PerSubject, PerAction}; SignedBundleBody view (omits signature) is the exact byte input to Ed25519 sign+verify per §12.3; canonical_signed_body_bytes() returns serde_json deterministic order. New crates/aios-policy/src/bundle_loader.rs: BundleLoader struct (trusted_authorities HashMap<String, VerifyingKey> + Option<expected_bundle_version>); load_from_bytes does 5 ordered checks (JSON parse → version pin → authority lookup → Ed25519 verify → per-rule conditions_parser::parse + RuleEffect::Unspecified rejection); load_from_file delegates via std::fs::read. PolicyError +4 variants: InvalidPolicyBundle(String) (rule <id> condition: <err>), BundleSignatureInvalid, BundleVersionMismatch{expected,found}, BundleUnknownAuthority(String). Dep additions: ed25519-dalek 2.1 + blake3 (workspace) + base64 0.22 (new workspace dep) + rand_core 0.6 dev-dep — Cargo.toml aios-policy only; workspace Cargo.toml gains base64 entry. lib.rs re-exports PolicyBundle, PolicyRule, RuleEffect, RuleScope, BundleLoader. Tests cover: happy round-trip, malformed JSON, per-rule condition parse failure, perturbed-body bad signature, unknown authority, version pin mismatch + match, empty rules valid, determinism (parse-twice byte-equal), positive signature material round-trip, RuleScope serde for all 5 variants, 50-rule scale smoke, PolicyError canonical Display strings, RuleEffect::Unspecified rejection, load_from_file. cargo check/test/clippy --all-targets -D warnings/fmt --check all PASS. Scope guard: hard_deny_engine.rs / kernel.rs / pipeline.rs / conditions*.rs / constraints.rs / hard_deny.rs / subject.rs / decision.rs UNTOUCHED. Spec deviation reported: brief asked for single condition string per rule + closed scope enum; S2.3 §11.2 is conditions[] list (multiple ANDed per §9.1) + bundles populate §5 tiers 4 & 5 — TRUST SPEC applied (rule keeps conditions: Vec<String>) and scope kept as orthogonal routing-hint enum.

completed.title: aios-policy — subject hydration + AI self-approval prevention (S2.3 §7 + §17)
completed.evidence: 498 tests workspace (+19 over T-022 baseline 479). New crates/aios-policy/src/subject_hydration.rs (~300 LoC, 3 inline unit tests). SubjectHydrator async trait + InMemoryHydrator HashMap-backed impl + HydratedRecord {subject, valid_until, revoked} + InMemoryHydrator::with_fixtures() pre-loading 4 canonical subjects (human:lucky, agent:dev, application:planner, service:systemd). Unknown / revoked / expired records collapse to PolicyError::SubjectUnauthenticated per §7. Blanket impl for Arc<T: SubjectHydrator + ?Sized + Send + Sync>. Pipeline step 2 wired via new DecisionPipeline::evaluate_with_chain which accepts (envelope, original_context, hydrated_context: Option<&PolicyContext>, engine: Option<&HardDenyEngine>); hydrated_context = None signals SubjectUnauthenticated short-circuit emitting Decision::Deny + reason_code=SubjectUnauthenticated. Kernel InMemoryPolicyKernel +2 ctors: new_with_full_chain(hydrator, engine) and new_with_subject_hydrator(hydrator). Kernel evaluate_policy now awaits hydrator.hydrate(subject_canonical_id) outside the (sync) pipeline driver and passes the resolved (Option<PolicyContext>) in. Pipeline §17 evaluator landed as pure function evaluate_ai_self_approval_prevention(decision, subject, envelope) -> Option<ApprovalRequirement> + DecisionPipeline::apply_step_8(decision, subject, envelope) -> PolicyDecision that mints the upgrade. §17.1 risk-flag detection over envelope.request.target.risk.<flag> (destructive/privileged/network_exposure/secret_access/recovery_path_affected); §17.3 carve-out: all-flags-false AI subject keeps ALLOW. Upgrade preserves policy_decision_id + request_hash + bundle_version + enrichment_snapshot_id; mutates decision → RequireApproval, reason_code → AiSelfApprovalUpgrade, approval → {required:true, ExactRequestHash, ttl 300, approver_classes:[Human], require_human_co_signer:false}; rules_consulted bumps by 1. lib.rs re-exports: SubjectHydrator, InMemoryHydrator, HydratedRecord, evaluate_ai_self_approval_prevention. New tests/subject_hydration.rs (8 tests): fixtures provide 4 canonical subjects, hydration determinism, unknown id rejection, expired record rejection, dyn trait Arc<dyn SubjectHydrator + Send + Sync> usable, kernel end-to-end SubjectUnauthenticated short-circuit, kernel end-to-end hydration replaces placeholder (lands at DefaultDeny), backward-compat kernel without hydrator. New tests/ai_self_approval.rs (8 tests): AI + ALLOW + risk → REQUIRE_APPROVAL upgrade, human + risk → unchanged ALLOW, AI + DENY → unchanged DENY, §17.3 carve-out preserves ALLOW, upgrade carries approver_classes=[Human] + ExactRequestHash, pure evaluator invariant truth table, audit fields preserved across upgrade, application subject also triggers upgrade. cargo check/test (498)/clippy --all-targets -D warnings/fmt --check all PASS. Scope guard: hard_deny_engine.rs / hard_deny.rs / conditions*.rs / constraints.rs / decision.rs / subject.rs / error.rs UNTOUCHED. Pipeline step 2 + step 8 are the ONLY pipeline modifications. T-023 (gRPC), T-024 (cache), T-025 (override boundary + acceptance fixtures + v0.1.0 bump) deferred.

completed.title: aios-policy — conditions vocabulary + EBNF parser + evaluator (S2.3 §9)
completed.evidence: 464 tests workspace (+57 over T-018 407). New crates/aios-policy/src/conditions.rs (~700 LoC) — closed AST: Condition (AND-only conjunction per §9.1; TRUST SPEC deviation from brief — §9.1 has no Or/Not/parens), Predicate (Compare/In/Contains/Exists), CompareOp (Eq/Neq/Lt/Lte/Gt/Gte), Namespace (6 closed), ClosedField (48 typed variants covering §9.2 base + Wave 4 §26.1 + Wave 9 §26.6 + Wave 5 §27.1 + Wave 6 §28.1 + Wave 17 §29.1 + TargetAdapterDeclared escape hatch per §9.2), Value (String/Identifier/Int/Bool/Timestamp). New conditions_parser.rs (~700 LoC) — hand-written recursive-descent (no pest/nom/combine per §21), pub fn parse(&str) -> Result<Condition, ConditionParseError>; 9-variant error enum all carrying 1-based (line, column); time.recovery_mode bare boolean sugar per §9.1; determinism §13.1 contract pinned by 100-iter round-trip test. New conditions_eval.rs (~600 LoC) — EvalContext borrows (HydratedSubject, ActionEnvelope, EnrichmentSnapshot, ClockSnapshot); pub fn evaluate(&Condition, &EvalContext) -> Result<bool, ConditionEvalError>; AND short-circuits on first false; target.<subpath> resolves against envelope.request.target serde_json::Value. PolicyError +2 variants. lib.rs re-exports. Tests: 16 module-level + 41 integration (26 parser + 15 eval). All 4 gates PASS. Scope guard: pipeline.rs / kernel.rs / precedence.rs / hard_deny.rs / hard_deny_engine.rs / constraints.rs / subject.rs UNTOUCHED.

completed.title: aios-policy — determinism + decision cache + perf benchmark (S2.3 §13 + §15 + §18.1)
completed.evidence: 555 tests workspace (+35 over T-023 baseline 520). Spec deviation acknowledged: brief proposed 3-tuple cache key (request_hash, bundle_version, snapshot_id); spec §13.3 mandates 2-tuple (request_hash, bundle_version) — TRUST SPEC applied; CacheKey is the 2-tuple, wire_form() renders 'polc_' + hex_lower(BLAKE3(JCS({request_hash, bundle_version})))[:32] verbatim. New crates/aios-policy/src/snapshot.rs (~280 LoC, 5 inline tests): EnrichmentSnapshot becomes REAL — full §8 shape (ObjectEnrichment {privacy_class, policy_tags, kind, lifecycle_state, created_by} + AdapterEnrichment {risk_template, default_sandbox_profile_id}); compute_id() returns 'polb_snap_' + hex_lower(BLAKE3(JCS(view)))[:32]; with_fields()/recompute_id() helpers. AIOS-FS read-path remains M4 STUBBED (snapshot is caller-driven). New src/cache.rs (~360 LoC, 10 inline tests): CacheKey (Hash+Eq+Clone), DecisionCache (lru::LruCache<CacheKey, PolicyDecision>), SharedDecisionCache (Arc<RwLock<DecisionCache>>) with poisoning-tolerant locks. invalidate_for_bundle(bundle_version) clears every entry matching version, returns count. DEFAULT_CAPACITY=1024. Capacity=0 collapses to default. New src/explain.rs (~230 LoC, 5 inline tests): DecisionPath {decision, rule_chain, narrative}; DecisionLog with hashmap+VecDeque ring buffer (DEFAULT_LOG_CAPACITY=1024); SharedDecisionLog Arc<RwLock<>>. InMemoryPolicyKernel: +2 ctors (new_with_cache, new_with_full_chain_and_cache); +set_active_bundle (RwLock-guarded swap, returns old bundle); +cache_handle. evaluate_policy: cache lookup BEFORE hydration (§18.1 sub-ms cached budget); cache hit refreshes evaluated_at, preserves original policy_decision_id; cache miss writes through after pipeline. BundleLoader: +accept_bundle(PolicyBundle) — skips JSON parse, runs steps 2-5 verbatim; used by LoadBundle RPC. service/conversions.rs: +proto_bundle_to_rust (bridges proto::PolicyBundle → Rust PolicyBundle; field aliasing: publisher_id→signing_authority, publisher_signature→signature_ed25519, bundle_id synthesized from bundle_version); +rule_effect_from_proto, +proto_rule_to_rust. service/server.rs: PolicyKernelService struct gained in_memory_kernel: Option<Arc<InMemoryPolicyKernel>> (typed sibling pointer for set_active_bundle), bundle_loader, cache, decision_log fields; +new_in_memory(Arc<InMemoryPolicyKernel>) ctor; +with_bundle_loader / with_cache / with_decision_log; active_bundle_version moved to Arc<RwLock<String>> for atomic LoadBundle swap. LoadBundle RPC: real (was Unimplemented in T-023) — bundle: None → InvalidArgument; no loader → Unimplemented; bridges proto→Rust, runs BundleLoader::accept_bundle, on stage_only returns without activate; on success swaps kernel.set_active_bundle + service version pointer + cache.invalidate_for_bundle(old_version); errors map to FailedPrecondition. ExplainDecision RPC: real (was Unimplemented) — no log → Unimplemented; unknown id → NotFound; known id → ExplainDecisionResponse{decision, rule_chain, narrative}. Decision recording wired into evaluate_internal. RollbackBundle stays Unimplemented (T-025 owns). New benches/policy_eval.rs (criterion 0.5; cargo bench --no-run compiles): bench_fresh_evaluation, bench_cached_evaluation, bench_mixed_workload_hit_rate (1000 envelopes, ~80% repeat); INFORMATIONAL — no numeric thresholds enforced in cargo test per brief §6. Cargo.toml additions: workspace lru=0.12, criterion=0.5, serde_jcs added to aios-policy. New tests/determinism_cache.rs (15 tests): same-envelope-twice-without-cache mints fresh ids; cache hit preserves first id refreshes evaluated_at; miss-then-hit; different bundle/request misses cache; enrichment_snapshot_id determinism + content-addressing (any field flip changes id); SharedDecisionCache concurrent 10-task reads; invalidate_for_bundle removes only matching version; LRU capacity bound evicts oldest; kernel without cache always runs pipeline; LoadBundle valid → activate + invalidate; LoadBundle invalid signature → FailedPrecondition + cache untouched; ExplainDecision known/unknown id → path/NotFound; CacheKey wire_form determinism. tests/grpc_roundtrip.rs deferred_rpcs test updated to reflect T-024 contract: LoadBundle(bundle=None)→InvalidArgument, ExplainDecision (no log)→Unimplemented (opt-in), RollbackBundle→Unimplemented (T-025). All 5 gates PASS: cargo check / cargo test --workspace (555) / cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings / cargo fmt --all -- --check / cargo bench -p aios-policy --no-run. Scope guard held: hard_deny_engine.rs / hard_deny.rs / conditions*.rs / constraints.rs / subject_hydration.rs / subject.rs / decision.rs / precedence.rs / error.rs / pipeline.rs UNTOUCHED. proto schema UNTOUCHED. bundle.rs UNTOUCHED. bundle_loader.rs: only +accept_bundle helper added (allowed by brief 'tiny swap helper' carve-out). T-025 (M3 closer: RollbackBundle + override boundary §16 + acceptance fixtures §22 + v0.1.0 bump) queued.
